findings.description: No session metadata visible in sidebar entries
findings.expected: Session entries should show metadata like message count, date, or size
findings.actual: Session entries are plain text buttons with name only

findings.description: No context summary or token usage display
findings.expected: Token usage, message count, or other context metrics should be visible

findings.description: No tooltip or secondary info shown on session hover
findings.expected: Hovering over a session could show creation date, message count, etc.
findings.actual: Hover only reveals the action/menu button
